basic_details.job_title: NeGD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Deputy General Manager/ Asst. General Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Deputy General Manager / Asst. General Manager
basic_details.short_information: National e-Governance Division (NeGD) Deputy General Manager / Asst. General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website negd.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NeGD Deputy General Manager / Asst. General Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Candidates who appeared in the Interview of Civil Services Examination (CSE) from 2022, 2023, 2024 and 2025.
qualification.details: Deputy General Manager (Dy.GM): Candidates who appeared in the Interview of Civil Services Examination (CSE) conducted by UPSC in 2022, 2023, 2024 and 2025. Minimum experience of more than 5 years. Asst. General Manager (AGM): Candidates who appeared in the Interview of Civil Services Examination (CSE) conducted by UPSC in 2022, 2023, 2024 and 2025. Minimum experience of between 2-5 years.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on UPSC marks and functional requirements. Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NeGD Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NeGD recruitment is 13th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Deputy General Manager and Assistant General Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates who have appeared for the Civil Services Examination (CSE) interview conducted by UPSC in 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025 are eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Deputy General Manager and Asst. General Manager posts?
faq.answer: For 2-5 years of experience, the salary is 22 LPA, and for more than 5 years of experience, it is 28 LPA.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the NeGD vacancies?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via email to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on UPSC marks and functional requirements, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification released by NeGD.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section in this article.
